creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
An update to 6.5.9 or later requires a shared library version bump (2->3).
Such updates are currently not allowed (ports thaw).

I will update ImageMagick as soon as FreeBSD 7.3 gets released and I
prefer updates to X.Y.Z-10, because only these distfiles keep stored for
a longer time on the distribution servers.
